modselector.setting.title: MCRider Setting Preset
modselector.preset.1.name: Classic
modselector.preset.1.desc: The default interface of vanilla Minecraft.
modselector.preset.2.name: Semi-Classic
modselector.preset.2.desc: The enhanced interface with a minimap, draft gauge, and more.
modselector.preset.3.name: MCRider
modselector.preset.3.desc: The interface unique to KartRider: Minecraft.
modselector.preset.4.name: Original
modselector.preset.4.desc: The original KartRider's interface recreated in pixel art.
